hero.name: Iumy Pimentel
hero.role: Software Engineering Student · Full Stack Dev
hero.description: Full Stack developer with 2 years of industry experience, building applications with React and Django. Passionate about clean code, solid architecture, and interfaces people actually use.

about.title:
Code with purpose,
design with intention.
about.p1: I am a computer technician and have a degree in software engineering. I am currently interning as a Full Stack developer, working with Django on the backend and React on the frontend.
about.p2: My focus is on software architecture, clean code, and robust REST APIs. I believe good code isn't just functional: it's readable, testable, and easy to evolve.
about.p3: I have experience with real projects involving application security, data modeling, technical documentation, and system integration. Always with attention to user experience.

real problems.

education.title: Academic journey

experience.title:
What I bring
to the team.

items.title: APIs & Integration
items.desc: Design and implementation of REST APIs with authentication, documentation, and versioning best practices.

items.title: Software Architecture
items.desc: System modeling with separation of concerns, design patterns, and focus on maintainability.

items.title: Application Security
items.desc: Implementing secure practices: JWT authentication, access control, protection against common vulnerabilities.

items.title: Clean Code
items.desc: Readable, well-named code without duplication — developed to be maintained and evolved by teams.

items.title: Real Full Stack
items.desc: Integrated experience from frontend (React) to backend (Django) through the database — no gaps in the stack.

items.title: Technical Documentation
items.desc: Creating artifacts, UML diagrams, specifications, and documentation that the team actually uses.
